rulings.Case Title: WEISSBERG VS PEINADO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing Of Order To Show Cause Why An Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 15, 2014, line 1. Order To Show Cause Why An Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue Continued to December 19, 2014 for Plaintiff to file a reply. Reply shall be filed no later than December 17, 2014. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: ZHOU HUA RONG et al VS. LARRY WEI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 15, 2014, line 2. CROSS DEFENDANTs CHRISTINA CHUNG and NRT WEST INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT Continued to January 14, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of reply to Department 501 no later than December 26, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: STEVEN F GREENWALD et al VS. STEVEN A MINISINI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 15, 2014, line 3. DEFENDANTs STEVEN MINISINI and JENNIFER CHOW's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to the causes of action for quiet title and injunctive relief with leave to amend to allege adverse interest in the portions of 56 Presidio and present controversy regarding 56 Presidio in light of the sale of 68 Presidio. Motion is DENIED as to the cause of action for removal of the encroachment structures. Moving party cites no authority for the proposition that removal can only be ordered as to the current owner of the adjacent property. Request for Injunctive relief is property under the facts alleged. Christensen v. Tucker (1953) 114 Cal.App.2d 554. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: ERIC BOICE et al VS. HARCOURT GROUP, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILIT et al (Pltfs Challenge Judge Quidachay)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Class Certification
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 15, 2014, line 4. PLAINTIFFs ERIC BOICE, VINETTA BOICE and YOWIE STROMBERG's Amended Motion For Class Certification Continued to January 15, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and reply to Department 501 no later than December 26, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: 131 STEUART STREET FOUNDATION, A CALIFORNIA VS. VERTIMAX VENTURES, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Vertimax Ventures, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 15, 2014, line 5. PLAINTIFF 131 STEUART STREET FOUNDATION's Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Vertimax Ventures, Inc. GRANTED, subject to opposition as follows: (1) Defendant's answer is stricken; (2) sanctions granted in the amount of $750 payable to Plaintiff's counsel within 5 days of notice of entry of order; (3) hearing required to address why Defendant shall not be sanctioned pursuant to CCP 177.5. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. SHEILA WILLIAM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 15, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT ANDRE WILLIAMS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. No opposition filed. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: PETER DIBONO ET AL VS. ANA SAUCEDO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Further Disco; Notice
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 15, 2014, line 7. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY DENIED, moot. Responses provided. No sanctions. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN POWELL VS. PHILIP HENLEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 15, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANT PHIL HANLEY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Complaint is not vague and ambiguous. See complaint paragraph 6(a)(1) and Exhibit 1 to complaint paragraph 2. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA SAM VS. NOE GUILLEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 15, 2014, line 9. PLAINTIFF MARIA SAM's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Moving party shifted its burden and opposing party presented evidence creating triable issues of fact re: daily damages; current terms of the rental agreement, etc. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: 735 TAYLOR I1, LP V. HANS REINHARDT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 15, 2014, line 10. DEFENDANTs HANS REINHARDT and NICOLA REINHARDT's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint and Notice sufficiently allege nuisance and opportunity to cure. Feder v. Wreden Packing & Provision (1928) 89 Cal. App. 665 does not stand for the proposition argued (i.e. "the requirement for an inspection at the end of the three-day period." Reply 2:21-22.). = (501/RBU)
